lines.text: Excuse me, where can I buy a transport ticket?
lines.fullTranslation: Affedersiniz, ulaşım bileti nereden satın alabilirim?

lines.text: You can buy one from the machine over there.
lines.fullTranslation: Bir tane şuradaki makineden satın alabilirsiniz.

lines.text: Does the machine accept credit cards?
lines.fullTranslation: Makine kredi kartlarını kabul ediyor mu?

lines.text: Yes, both cards and cash are accepted.
lines.fullTranslation: Evet, hem kartlar hem nakit kabul ediliyor.

lines.text: Has the train to Rotterdam been delayed?
Unfortunately, it is delayed by twenty minutes.
Do you know the reason for the delay?
There was a technical issue on the railway.
Does this bus go to the city center?
lines.fullTranslation: Bu otobüs şehir merkezine gidiyor mu?

lines.text: Yes, but you need to change buses once.
lines.fullTranslation: Evet, ama bir kez otobüs değiştirmeniz gerekiyor.

lines.text: Where should I change?
At Central Station.
I think I missed my stop.
The next stop is only two minutes away.
lines.fullTranslation: Sonraki durak sadece iki dakika uzaklıkta.

lines.text: Can I walk back from there?
Yes, it is a short walk.
I would like to buy a monthly transport pass.
lines.fullTranslation: Aylık ulaşım kartı satın almak istiyorum.

lines.text: Do you already have a transport card?
lines.fullTranslation: Zaten bir ulaşım kartınız var mı?

lines.text: No, this would be my first one.
lines.fullTranslation: Hayır, bu benim ilk kartım olurdu.

lines.text: Then we will need your identification.
Could you take me to the airport, please?
Certainly. Do you prefer the fastest route?
lines.fullTranslation: Tabii ki. En hızlı rotayı mı tercih ediyorsunuz?

lines.text: Yes, I am in a bit of a hurry.
We should arrive in about twenty minutes.
Which platform does the train depart from?
It will depart from platform six.
Has boarding started already?
No, passengers may board in about ten minutes.
lines.fullTranslation: Hayır, yolcular yaklaşık on dakika içinde binebilir.

lines.text: Do you rent bicycles here?
Yes, we rent them by the hour or by the day.
lines.fullTranslation: Evet, onları saatlik veya günlük kiralıyoruz.

lines.text: How much does it cost for one day?
lines.fullTranslation: Bir gün için ne kadar tutuyor?

lines.text: Fifteen euros including a lock.
I think I boarded the wrong train.
Where are you trying to go?
I am trying to get to Utrecht.
You should get off at the next station and transfer.
The train is extremely crowded today.
Is it always this busy during the evening?
lines.fullTranslation: Akşam sırasında her zaman bu kadar yoğun mu?

lines.text: Yes, especially during rush hour.
I should probably travel earlier next time.
lines.fullTranslation: Muhtemelen bir dahaki sefere daha erken seyahat etmeliyim.

lines.text: I left my bag on the tram this morning.
Can you describe the bag for me?
lines.fullTranslation: Çantayı benim için tarif edebilir misiniz?

lines.text: It is black with a small blue label.
Please fill out this lost property form.
lines.fullTranslation: Lütfen bu kayıp eşya formunu doldurun.

lines.text: What is the best way to get around the city?
lines.fullTranslation: Şehirde dolaşmanın en iyi yolu nedir?

lines.text: Public transportation is usually very reliable.
Would you recommend buses or trams?
lines.fullTranslation: Otobüsleri mi yoksa tramvayları mı tavsiye edersiniz?

lines.text: Trams are usually faster in the city center.
lines.fullTranslation: Tramvaylar genellikle şehir merkezinde daha hızlı.
